dataValues.description: Data values passed on runtime. Requires a [named data source](https://vega.github.io/vega-lite/docs/data.html#named) in the provided `spec`. Either passed as a base64 encoded string or as an object.

spec.description: [Vega-Lite spec](https://vega.github.io/vega-lite/docs/spec.html) either as an object or base64 encoded string.

noShadow.description: Renders the element without a shadow root

unstyled.description: Render the element without additional styles

for.description:
Query selector of an `eox-map` (`String`, passed as an attribute or property)
or an `eox-map` DOM element (`HTMLElement`, passed as property)

continuous.description:
Enables the user to draw continuously one feature after another
without having to discard previous ones manually

featureName.description: The display name of drawn features, shown e.g. in the feature list.

featureNameKey.description: The key of the property to display in the feature list.

layerId.description: The ID of the Vector/Vector Tile Layer that contains features to be selected

featureStyles.description: Flat styles for the drawn/selected features

multipleFeatures.description: Allow adding more than one feature at a time

measure.description:
Display area/line measurement for the drawn features.
When enabled, a "measure" property is added to each drawn feature's properties,
containing the calculated area (for Polygons and Circles) or length (for LineStrings).
This measurement is also displayed as a text label on the map using OpenLayers flat styles.

importFeatures.description: Allow import features using drag-drop and upload button

showEditor.description: Show geo-json editor for draw tool

projection.description: Projection of the emitted drawn features

noShadow.description: Renders the element without a shadow root

format.description: The format in which the drawn features should be emitted

unstyled.description: Render the element without additional styles

drawnFeatures.description:
The array of drawn native OpenLayers features. Normally includes only one feature, until multiple feature drawing is enabled.
Pass features to be drawn on the map by setting this property. The features should be in the same projection as the map, or a projection should be specified via the `projection` property for proper transformation.

eoxMap.description: The eox-map instance associated with the draw tools

currentlyDrawing.description: Whether the user is currently in the process of drawing or not

drawLayer.description: The current native OpenLayers draw `layer` (initialized with a `zIndex` of 100)

endpoint.description: The endpoint to send the feedback to as POST message.

unstyled.description: If provided, the element will not be styled with EOX styles.

schema.description: The JSON schema for the feedback form (option). Requires `eox-jsonform` to be imported.

endpoint.description: The OpenCage API endpoint to use for the search, including the key but without the query parameter.

for.description:
Query selector of an `eox-map` (`String`, passed as an attribute or property)
or an `eox-map` DOM element (`HTMLElement`, passed as property)

queryParameter.description: The name of the query parameter to use for the search query in the endpoint URI.

button.description:
Whether or not to enable button mode, which hides and shows the input field
similar to how a modal works.

interval.description: Set a custom interval for the debounce function.

small.description: Enables a smaller version of the button for use in map controls.

label.description: Which text to use for the button if it is enabled.

direction.description:
The direction of the search input relative to the button, with the following options:

- `left`
- `top`
- `right`
- `bottom`

resultsDirection.description:
The direction of the results box relative to the input, with the following options:

- `left`
- `top`
- `right`
- `bottom`

unstyled.description: Render the element without additional styles

extent.description:
Geographic extent to limit search results in the format "minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat".
This corresponds to OpenCage API's bounds parameter.
Example: "-0.563160,51.280430,0.278970,51.683979"

tooltip.description: Tooltip text to display on the search button/input (uses BeerCSS tooltip).

tooltipDirection.description:
Direction of the tooltip relative to the button.
Options: "top", "bottom", "left", "right"
Default: "left"

params.description:
Additional parameters to add to the query string as key-value pairs.
Example: { language: "en", limit: 10, countrycode: "us" }

items.description: The items to be filtered. Can be passed as a property or stringified JSON attribute.

aggregateResults.description: Aggregate results by a property key

autoSpreadSingle.description:
Automatically spread single item summaries
removing the summary header

enableHighlighting.description: Highlighting of search result character matches

filterProperties.description: The filter properties. Can be passed as a property or stringified JSON attribute.

inlineMode.description:
Inline mode, for rendering the itemfilter in a very condensed space.
Expects showResults to be false

matchAllWhenEmpty.description: Show all result items if nothing is input by the user

titleProperty.description:
The property of the result items used for display
Supports passing a function which recieves the current item as parameter and is expected to return a string

subTitleProperty.description:
The property of the result items used for a subtitle
Supports passing a function which recieves the current item as parameter and is expected to return a string

imageProperty.description:
The property of the result items used for an image
Supports passing a function which recieves the current item as parameter and is expected to return a string

resultSorting.description:
Sorting behavior for the results. Can be:
- undefined (default): smart alphabetical sorting (skips if externalFilter or fuseConfig.shouldSort is truthy)
- false: no sorting
- string: property key to sort by (ascending)
- function: custom comparator function (a, b) => number
- object: { key: string, order?: 'asc' | 'desc' }

expandMultipleFilters.description: Allow opening multiple filter accordions in parallel

expandMultipleResults.description: Allow opening multiple result accordions in parallel

resultType.description: Rendering type for results. Can be `list`or `cards` (`cards` requires also importing the `eox-layout` element)

enableResultAction.description: Enable result action button (a secondary action besides the normal result selection)

resultActionIcon.description: Icon for result action. Supports html

unstyled.description: Render the element without additional styles

filters.description: The state object containing the applied filters.

results.description: The state object containing the filtered results.

externalFilter.description:
Use an external search endpoint instead of fuse search.
Passed properties: input string, filters object.
The function can return a URL string, or an object containing a `url,
an optional `fetchFn` to handle the request, or/and an optional `key` to
return a specific property from the fetched data.
This is a property-only field as it expects a function.

value.description: JSON value of the form editor

defaults.description: Default values for the JSONEditor instance

customEditorInterfaces.description:
List of custom editor interface
Read more about the implementation of custom editor interfaces here:
https://github.com/json-editor/json-editor/blob/master/docs/custom-editor.html

noShadow.description: Renders the element without a shadow root

propertiesToggle.description:
Shows a toggle for showing/hiding object properties editing buttons
To be used in combination with `options.disable_properties = false`

unstyled.description: Render the element without additional styles

for.description:
Query selector of an `eox-map` (`String`, passed as an attribute or property)
or an `eox-map` DOM element (`HTMLElement`, passed as property)

showLayerZoomState.description: Show layer state based on zoom level or not

unstyled.description: Render the element without additional styles

toolsAsList.description: If enabled, the tools section will be rendered as list.

globallyExclusiveLayers.description: If enabled, exclusive layers (marked with the property `layerControlExclusive`) will be globally exclusive (default: exclusive within their layer group).

toolsAutoExpand.description: If enabled, toggling the layer visibility will also open/close the layer tools.

customEditorInterfaces.description:
List of custom editor interfaces for layer config eox-jsonforms
Read more about the implementation of custom editor interfaces here:
https://github.com/json-editor/json-editor/blob/master/docs/custom-editor.html

fill-grid.description: If present, the layout will automatically fill available space.

gap.description: Gap between layout items in pixels.

mediaBreakpoints.description: The breakpoints for small/medium/large screens (in pixel).

x.description: The x coordinate (zero-indexed) of the layout item.

y.description: The y coordinate (zero-indexed) of the layout item.

w.description: The width (in grid slots) of the layout item.

h.description: The height (in grid slots) of the layout item.

config.description: Gets the current configuration of the map.

center.description: Gets the current center coordinates of the map.

layers.description: Gets the current layers of the map

zoom.description: Gets the current zoom level of the map.

interactions.description: Object to store various map interactions (e.g., drag, zoom).

lonLatCenter.description: Gets the current center of the map in longitude and latitude.

lonLatExtent.description: Gets the current extent of the map in longitude and latitude.

preventScroll.description: Gets the current scroll interaction state.

sync.description: Gets the current sync state of the map.

zoomExtent.description: Gets the current extent of the map.

globeConfig.description: Gets the current globe configuration properties.

last2dProjection.description: Stores the last 2D projection to switch back from globe view.

globeEnabled.description: Sets the  Whether the globe is enabled.

selectInteractions.description: Object to store selection interactions for the map.

mapControls.description: Object to store map controls (e.g., custom buttons, geolocation).

globe.description:
The globe instance when using globe projection.
todo: define proper type

allowHtml.description: Whether to allow HTML in the property display

for.description: The identifier for the STAC resource to fetch

header.description: Keys of properties to display in the header

tags.description: Keys of properties to display to display as tags

body.description: Keys of properties to display to display in the main body

featured.description: Keys of properties to display in the featured section

footer.description: Keys of properties to display in the footer

stacInfo.description: The state object containing the fetched STAC information

stacProperties.description: The state object containing the parsed STAC properties

showHeroScrollIndicator.description: Enable or disable hero scroll indicator

noShadow.description: Renders the element without a shadow root

unstyled.description: Render the element without additional styles

for.description:
Query selector of an `eox-map` (`String`, passed as an attribute or property)
or an `eox-map` DOM element (`HTMLElement`, passed as property)

titleKey.description: Property key used to retrieve layer titles (default: "name").

layerIdKey.description: Property key used to identify layers (default: "id").

showUTC.description: Whether to show UTC dates in the timecontrol (default: false).

externalMapRendering.description: Whether external map rendering is enabled for timelapse export.

selectedDateRange.description: The currently selected date range as [startDate, endDate] in ISO format.

initDate.description: The initial date range as [startDate, endDate] in ISO/UTC format.

sliderValues.description: Sets the array of slider values.

eoxMap.description: Sets the reference to the associated eox-map element.

groups.description: Sets the DataSet containing timeline groups.

items.description: Sets the DataSet containing timeline items.

dateChange.description: Handler for date change events. Updates the selected date range and applies it to map layers.

filter.description: Handler for filter events from eox-itemfilter. Updates timeline item visibility based on filter results.

config.description: The driver.js configuration object. See the [driver.js docs](https://driverjs.com/docs/configuration) for available options.

showEveryTime.description:
Whether to show the tour every time the component is mounted,
bypassing the `localStorage` check.

preventAutoStart.description:
Whether to prevent the tour from starting automatically on mount.
If true, the tour must be started manually via the `start()` method.

unstyled.description: Whether to disable the default EOx branded styling.

title.description: Main title of the hero section

as.description: Render hero background as an image or a video

background.description: URL of the hero background image/video source

description.description: Sub-description text to overlay on the hero section

title.description: Title of the text narrative section

as.description: Target element type to render under the tour, e.g. 'eox-map' or 'img'

position.description: Position of the text narrative overlay relative to the media

children.description: Array of tour step component IDs

description.description: Description narrative content of the tour step

stepDescription.description: Alternative tour step description narrative content

config.description: Configuration object or string containing layers/zoom/center settings for the step
